subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou in the Persian tongue to the Voice of the Wronged One across the horizons: The whole world hath been created for the knowledge of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندای مظلوم افاق را بلسان پارسی بشنو جمیع عالم لاجل عرفان الله خلق شده اند
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rejection of Muhammad, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
